creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ohauer
Date: Sat Apr  5 20:23:59 2014
New Revision: 350263
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350263
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350263/

Log:
  - mark this port for removal on 2014-05-01
    port depends on net/spread, which expired on 2014-03-10
  
  PR:		ports/188128
  Submitted by:	rene

Modified:
  head/www/spreadlogd/Makefile

Modified: head/www/spreadlogd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/spreadlogd/Makefile	Sat Apr  5 20:12:35 2014	(r350262)
+++ head/www/spreadlogd/Makefile	Sat Apr  5 20:23:59 2014	(r350263)
@@ -9,6 +9,9 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lethargy.org/mo
 MAINTAINER=	apache@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	The backend of mod_log_spread
 
+DEPRECATED=	Depends on expired net/spread
+EXPIRATION_DATE=2014-05-01
+
 LICENSE=	ART10
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libspread.so:${PORTSDIR}/net/spread
